title: The Ancient Highway
writer: James Oliver Curwood, James Shelley Hamilton, Eve Unsell
actors: Jack Holt, Billie Dove, Montagu Love
plot: Long thought dead, young Clifton Brant returns to his small town along the St. Lawrence River in Canada, after traveling around the world. He has come back to take revenge on millionaire Ivan Hurd, who has cheated his father. Hurd...
